description: Student profile photo atom rendered as an 80x80 image inside a Drupal layout builder block wrapper.

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Student profile photo with name as alt text

stories.name: PhDCandidate
stories.description: Student profile photo for a PhD candidate

notes: The img is always rendered at width=80 height=80 with loading=eager. The root div should carry classes 'block block-layout-builder block-field-blocknodestudent-profilefield-stup-profile-image' following the same Drupal block wrapper pattern used in StudentProfileName. The selector in the manifest targets the img child, but the component wraps it in the block div.
